page_content:
GREEK LANGUAGE AND CULTURE MINOR

Department of Classics http://classics.umd.edu

Director of Undergraduate Studies: Jorge J. Bravo III, Ph.D.

This minor may be earned in either the ancient or the modern Greek language (not a combination). In completing it, the student will reach an intermediate or advanced level of proﬁciency in the language and will also be introduced to the history and culture of Greece.

To make an appointment to explore or declare the minor, contact the Director of Undergraduate Studies, Dr. Jorge J. Bravo III (jbravo@umd.edu). If you wish to minor in Modern Greek, he will put you in touch with the instructor of Modern Greek, Dr. Polyvia Parara, for placement.
